title: Household Essentials Handled Basket, Two Tone Seagrass and Paper Rope, Black and Natural
features: This intricately woven handled storage basket is handcrafted from natural seagrass, stylishly wrapped around a sturdy metal frame
Natural seagrass, paper rope, and metal storage basket
Add a touch of natural beauty to any bedroom or living space with this durably woven storage basket
description: This stunning, organically woven storage basket will transform any bedroom or living space by stylishly stowing away sweaters, textiles, or bits and baubles. Neatly corral any bulky, rarely used, or unsightly household items in the ample storage space, and utilize the sleek, integrated handles for easy mobility. Timeless detailing and natural appeal will carry this sophisticated storage piece through every home refresh. Storage basket is made from natural seagrass, paper rope, and metal, and measures 11.5" W x 11.5" D x 14" H. Structured metal frame ensures the strength and longevity of the piece.
